title: chaseopsis aurantiaca
intro: Chaseopsis aurantiaca, also known as Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chaseopsis aurantiaca include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
